summary: Comprehensive backend (16/16 pytest passing) and frontend UI testing completed for POS Billing System. All POS, Inventory, Bills, Customers, Reports, and Settings flows work end-to-end. Stock decrement, customer auto-save, GST/discount math, hold/resume cart, barcode scan, category filter, and CRUD all verified.

issues: Empty form fields (GSTIN/Address/Phone/Email) show no labels above inputs - only placeholders. Minor a11y concern.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 441 lines and uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan handlers.
Reports query uses ISO string comparison ($gte with isoformat) which works only because all created_at are stored as ISO strings - fragile if any future code writes raw datetime objects.
BillingPOS.jsx likely a large single-file component; consider splitting into POS/Inventory/Bills/Reports/Settings sub-components for maintainability.
No backend input validation for negative price/stock or empty barcode duplicates - bills can be created with arbitrary totals (trust frontend math).
Stock is decremented on bill creation but no check prevents selling more than available stock (can go negative).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded 24 products. Test created/cleaned TEST_ prefixed products, customers, bills, and held carts during runs (some test bills/customers remain in DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_pos_api.py covers all 16 endpoints. Frontend Playwright flow validated full POS->Bills->Customers->Reports->Inventory->Settings journey. Bills math verified: 3 Burger (360) + 1 Tea (30) = 390 subtotal, 10% discount = 39, GST 18% on 351 = 63.18, total = 414.18 - all correct. Some TEST_ data persists in DB.
